name: slider-demo
visual_summary: The slider-demo is a visual slider component used to allow users to select a value from a range, often used in settings, product configurations, or data representations. It features a track with a draggable thumb for smooth and precise value adjustments. The component is suitable for applications requiring a flexible and intuitive way to input data within a specific range.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready component component with the following characteristics:

Name: slider-demo
Description: The slider-demo is a visual slider component used to allow users to select a value from a range, often used in settings, product configurations, or data representations. It features a track with a draggable thumb for smooth and precise value adjustments. The component is suitable for applications requiring a flexible and intuitive way to input data within a specific range.
Style: modern, flat, rounded-corner
Interactions: draggable, animated, responsive
Tags: slider, range-selector, settings, configurable, input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
